title: RC1_N
extract_protocol_ch1.1: Sequencing libraries were generated using NEBNext® UltraTM RNA Library Prep Kit for Illumina
data_processing: Paired-end clean reads were aligned to the human reference genome GRCh38 (hg38) using Hisat2 v2.0.5.
data_processing.1: Counts v1.5.0-p3 was used to count the read numbers mapped to each gene.
data_processing.2: Fragments per kilobase of transcript per million mapped reads (FPKM) of each gene were calculated based on the length of the gene and read count mapped it.
data_processing.4: Supplementary_files_format_and_content: xls file includes FPKM values for each sample
